templates.name: Recruitment Message
templates.content:
🔥 **WE'RE RECRUITING!** 🔥

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Contact:** {sender_name}

Join us and dominate {server_name}!

💪 Active players welcome!
🎯 Team-oriented gameplay
🏆 Competitive and fun environment

templates.name: Alliance Meeting
[S02] Temperature Alert
templates.content:
❄️ **[S02] TEMPERATURE ALERT** ❄️

**Current Temp:** {notes}
**Action Required:** Keep furnaces fueled with coal!

⚠️ Frozen bases lose functionality
🔥 Use High-Heat Furnaces to stay warm
🏭 Check Alliance Furnace coverage

**Reminder:** Base temperature ranges from -15°C to -80°C. Don't let your base freeze!

templates.name: [S02] Rare Soil Coordination
[S02] Polar Beast Rally
[S02] Supply Collection Alert
[S02] Resource Donation Request
templates.content:
⛏️ **[S02] RESOURCE DONATION NEEDED** ⛏️

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Requested by:** {sender_name}

**Resources Needed:**
{notes}

🪨 **Coal** - Fuels furnaces and constructs buildings
🔩 **Titanium Alloy** - Upgrades furnaces and military structures

**How to get:**
✅ Complete Season 2 quests
✅ Win battles against polar enemies
✅ Collect from Supply Collections
✅ Alliance donations

Every contribution helps our alliance ranking!

templates.name: [S02] Weekly Mission Reminder
templates.content:
📋 **[S02] WEEKLY MISSIONS** 📋

**Week:** {notes}
**Server:** {server_name}
**Reset:** {event_time}

🎯 **Alliance Goals:**
• Mutual Assistance contributions
• Siege operations participation
• Rare Soil War activity
• Combat victories tracking

🎁 **Rewards Available:**
• Coal & Titanium Alloy
• Weekly Pass rewards
• Season Battle Pass progress
• Hero weapon passes (Murphy, Carlie, Swift)

Let's complete these together!

templates.name: [S02] Siege Operation
[S02] Emperor Boreas Battle
templates.content:
👑 **[S02] EMPEROR BOREAS BATTLE** 👑

**Rally Leader:** {sender_name}
**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Rally Time:** {event_time}

❄️ **Mission:** Defeat Emperor Boreas!
🎯 **Objective:** Primary season goal
🏆 **Rewards:** Major alliance ranking boost

**Preparation Required:**
• Max furnace heat for virus resistance
• Upgraded military structures
• Full hero lineup
• Coordinate with alliance members

{notes}

@everyone This is the BIG ONE! Let's take down Boreas!

templates.name: Kingdom Event (KE) Reminder
Server vs Server (SVS) Prep
Alliance Duel Reminder
templates.content:
⚡ **ALLIANCE DUEL** ⚡

**Our Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**Opponent:** {notes}
**Duel Time:** {event_time}

🎯 **Strategy:**
• Coordinate attacks in Discord
• Focus on objectives
• Support your teammates
• Track enemy movements

🏆 **Win Conditions:**
• Most points wins
• Team coordination is critical
• Every battle counts!

**Organized by:** {sender_name}

@everyone Time to duel!

templates.name: Server War Coordination
templates.content:
🌍 **SERVER WAR** 🌍

**Alliance:** {alliance_name} [{alliance_tag}]
**War Start:** {event_time}
**War Commander:** {sender_name}

⚔️ **Battle Plan:**
{notes}

🛡️ **Preparation:**
• Max troops ready
• Heroes leveled and equipped
• Resources secured
• Rally assignments confirmed

🏆 **Objectives:**
• Capture strategic points
• Defend alliance territory  
• Support allied rallies
• Maximize alliance contribution

**FOR THE ALLIANCE!**

@everyone Prepare for war!
